name: Ernesti Echevarria
nativeName: エルネスティ・エチェバルリア
description: He is studious and quiet but hardworking and devoted. Not only is he mature, he is also quite protective of his friends. He devotes himself to studying and can be quite brave, evident from challenging a Behemoth alone. He is troubled by his short stature and feminine appearance that led to people hugging him. He is usually composed and quiet but displays excitement whenever Silhouette Knights are mentioned. He can also be quite forceful evidenced when he skips and exempts himself from other clas
searchTerms: エルネスティ・エチェバルリア

name: Gou
description: Gou is a 10-year old boy who’s aim is to capture the mythical Pokémon Mew he met when he was little. He usually has a calm demeanor but can be hot headed at times. His dream is to catch every Pokémon. Voiced by [Kei Shindou](https://anilist.co/staff/95594/Kei-Shindou) during his early childhood.
mediaTitles: Pokémon: To Be a Pokémon Master: Ultimate Journeys: The Series
searchTerms: Pokémon: To Be a Pokémon Master: Ultimate Journeys: The Series

name: Izuru Kira
description: __Height:__ 173 cm (5'8") __Rank:__ Lieutenant of the 3rd Division Izuru Kira was born to a family of lesser nobility, his parents having been dead since he was young. While in the Shinigami Academy, Kira befriended Momo Hinamori, Renji Abarai, and Shūhei Hisagi, and they were often seen spending time together. After graduation, Kira, along with Renji and Momo, was sent to the 5th Division, where he stayed until Gin Ichimaru became Captain of the 3rd Division. Kira is loyal to both his friends a

name: Kuraudo Ooishi
description: Kuraudo Oishi is a veteran police investigator at Okinomiya who has vowed to solve the mystery of the Hinamizawa murders before his retirement, due to personal reasons. Due to his uncouth tactics and the lengths that he goes to in order to solve the mystery, he is looked upon as a nuisance by the villagers. ~!He approaches one of the main characters to become his informant in several arcs, and is sometimes unwittingly responsible for triggering their paranoia.!~

name: Mika
description: Lamenting the worsening of his eyesight as he grows older day after day, he is the surrogate parent gently overseeing his problematic employees. Ohagi mochi and coffee, Japanese clothing and a café. It’s all about expressing a mix of Japanese and Western styles. He is the manager of the café with a traditional Japanese twist, "Café LycoReco”. ~!In episode 7 of the anime, it is revealed that Mika is gay.!~
mediaTitles: Lycoris Recoil -Friends are thieves of time.-
searchTerms: Lycoris Recoil -Friends are thieves of time.-

name: Nalu Tanaka
description: A boy with a Japanese father who is a geophysicist and researcher, and a free-spirited Hawaiian mother. He is a family friend of the Hinaokas, and has known Masaki since childhood. He loves both surfing and his ukelele, and always rides the waves before going to school. Ever since Shou came and Masaki started surfing, the three of them have been waking up to surf in the early mornings. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Perez Durelli
description: Perez is an illegitimate son of the emperor, born from a concubine, which puts him in a precarious position within the imperial family. Due to his status, he initially lives a harsh and secluded life, facing neglect and contempt from those around him. However, as the story progresses, Perez becomes a significant figure in the plot, particularly in his relationship with the protagonist, Firentia Lombardi.

name: Ran Mao
description: __Height__: 168 cm One of Lau's girls from his opium den. He introduces her to Ciel and company as "his little sister, though not by blood." Ranmao almost never speaks and seems entirely unflappable. But she's not as harmless as she looks... ~! Ran Mao fights Sebastian who comments that "She has destructive power despite her tiny body". !~

name: Sagaru Yamazaki
description: Yamazaki is a spy, whose specialty is naturally gathering intelligence. Yamazaki is often caught by Hijikata playing badminton by himself, and he is subsequently beaten. He is often seen cosplaying as a badminton-playing version of Echizen Ryoma from The Prince of Tennis. In episode 62 he was caught saying "Mada mada dane", which is Ryoma Echizen's catchphrase. His role as a ninja is roughly based on Yamazaki Susumu, but is never really exercised besides one unsuccessful attempt to spy on Gintok

name: Ueno
description: The Science Club's president. She secretly has feelings for Tanaka.
mediaTitles: How clumsy you are, Miss Ueno.
searchTerms: How clumsy you are, Miss Ueno.

name: Yakumo Ezo
description: __Height:__ 157 cm Yakumo Ezo is the Anti-Demon Corps' 5th Unit Chief.

name: Zakuro Oshigiri
description: Oshigiri Zakuro is a stealth-type game uploader, characterized by his masked mouth and ability to conceal his presence well even in real life. He is often stoic but harbors a shy side especially around women, which makes him a target of Yuzu's teasing.

name: Daikichi Kawachi
description: Daikichi is a 30-year-old bachelor who has a tendency of scaring away both women and children. Whilst he doesn't exactly mind that he scares children, as he isn't too fond of young people, he seems to be lonely as a single man. At his grandfather's funeral, he meets a newly orphaned illegitimate child, named Rin. In a fit of anger at his relatives' cold shoulder to the girl, he announces that he will be the one to take care of her. Daikichi now finds himself in the role of father and must adjust

name: Ghiaccio
description: Ghiaccio is a man of average height and slim to medium build.
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind

name: Kodaka Hasegawa
description: Kodaka is a transfer student who has not been able to make friends in his first month at St, Chronica's. Of all of the members of the club, he is the most gentle, balanced and socially competent in personality; but his unusual hair color, inherited from his late English mother, leads classmates to assume he is a violent and abusive delinquent and spread defamatory rumors about him. Because of his long experience of antagonism, Kodaka has become accustomed to fighting and can defend himself quite

name: Kyou Nekozaki
description: **Height:** 166 cm She's one of Shikimori's friends. She is a cheerful and energetic gymnast. She has a friendly personality. She watches over [Shikimori](https://anilist.co/character/155702)'s relationship with [Yuu](https://anilist.co/character/155701).

name: Lilia Vanrouge
nativeName: リリア・ヴァンルージュ
description: Lilia Vanrouge is a third-year in Diasomnia and Malleus' supervisor. He is a mysterious person who, although having the appearance of a young boy, is rumored to be an ancient being.
mediaTitles: Disney Twisted-Wonderland: The Manga – Book of Heartslabyul

name: Masato Oujou
description: Masato is the director of the Kabaddi Department at Noukin High School. He masters the "counter" that covers his slender physique and boasts the top level ability in Japan. He can also look like a beast when switched on during play. He has been in Kabaddi for over 10 years.

name: Mina Hibino
description: Mina is an energetic, bubbly girl and always cheerful in the group. She is very playful at all times and always noisy. Mina also is bad at running and gets tired easily, such as when she was excited for the school marathon, yet got tired at the start.

name: Momoka Sakurai
description: **Height:** 145 cm **Hometown:** Kobe Prefecture, Japan Momoka is a young, elegant girl from a wealthy family. Due to her princess-like demeanor, she has a lady-like aura surrounding her. While Momoka tries to act older than she is, she is still a just a young girl and enjoys things others her age enjoy. Despite insisting she be treated like a lady, she uses the childish honorific "-chama" when addressing the Producer. Momoka enjoys tea parties and takes them very seriously, inviting many of the

name: Nii-chan
description: Nii-chan is Shiemi Moriyama's Familiar that she summons during the demonstration after Izumo Kamiki summoned two spirit foxes. It is a baby Greenman spirit that takes a liking to Shiemi often sitting on top of her head. Nii-chan aids Shiemi by producing plant from it's body such as aloe and sprouts tree branches as barriers. Nii-chan appears protective of Shiemi as he shields her from the falling debris during a mission in the amusement park with tree barriers. Possibly because it's still an inf

name: Nikola Tesla
description: Nikola Tesla is a scientist just like his real-life counterpart. He doesn't believe in things like magic or gods, claiming they are just laws of Physics. ~!He is the 8th fighter for Humanity in the Ragnarok Tournament, and his volund is with the 9th Valkyrie sister, Gondoul.!~

name: Remlin Tissark
description: __Height:__ 153 cm __Affiliation:__ Canvas Town __Occupation:__ Spellcaster Remlin is a small, young kid who was chosen by [Gob](https://anilist.co/character/298956/Gob) to be the heir of his Vital Instrument, a jinki passed down from generation to generation within Canvas Town. They are a cheerful and celebratory kid, and despite having moments of extreme vulnerability is able to bounce back quickly and return to being joyful. Remlin, given for their age, is very childish, as they get excited e

name: Ren
description: A young boy who runs away from home and ends up accidentally going to the beast world. He meets a beast named [Kumatetsu](https://anilist.co/character/122871), who is a potential candidate to become lord of the beast world. Kumatetsu ends up making Ren his apprentice and later names him Kyuuta.
